title: corchorus saxatilis
intro: Corchorus saxatilis, also known as the bush jute or Indian jute, is a type of flowering plant in the mallow family that is native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Corchorus saxatilis include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
